description: Autonomous Long-Run Mode initiative — `/compose gsd <feature>` as a third lifecycle mode (alongside build/fix) for long autonomous runs across many context windows. Parity pass against gsd-build/gsd-2 — adopt the capabilities Compose lacks (per-task fresh context, worktree isolation, budget ceilings, stuck detection, milestone reports), reuse Compose's existing lifecycle/journal/gates as the substrate. Umbrella for COMP-GSD-1 through COMP-GSD-7.
